strDB.str: "Anchor Point Grouping" in Settings affects target of crookedness
Set "Anchor Point Grouping" to "Character"  in the Settings below for the most pleasing look.
Set Shape to "Square" for hard-cutoff for next characters, use "Ramp Up" for a longer animation tail.and "Ramp Up" for a longer visible tail.
SubMachine is a collaboration between Creative Workflow Solutions & BMP Creative.All Provided Mogrts can be fully modified to your preference in After Effects.CWSPRODUCTS.GUMROAD.COM
